---
name: AI SDLC Change Request
about: Request a new feature, update, or fix through the AI SDLC workflow
title: "[AI SDLC]: "
labels: ai-sdlc, ai-awaiting-clarification
---

## What do you want to create or change?

Describe the new website, feature, update, or fix.

## Why is this needed?

Explain the business/user reason.

## Who is the user or customer?

Describe who benefits from this change.

## Is this for a new app or an existing app?

- [ ] New app
- [ ] Existing app

## Any known constraints?

Examples:
- deadline
- design constraints
- technical constraints
- compliance concerns
- browser/device requirements
- budget/cost constraints

## Any examples, screenshots, links, or reference material?

Add anything useful here.

## Definition of done, if known

Describe what success looks like.
